data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for actor/time metadata for every lifecycle transition.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for actor/time metadata for every lifecycle transition. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence of this metadata. The linked use case mentions the need for this metadata but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or validation in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence of actor/time metadata for lifecycle transitions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence of actor/time metadata for lifecycle transitions.
